description_long: This airplane features a sleek, angular design with a dark metallic body accented by red lines along its edges and panel seams. The wings are sharply swept back and extend outward with a slight anhedral angle, giving the aircraft a menacing, futuristic appearance. Two prominent cylindrical jet engines are mounted under each wing, and the nose is pointed and streamlined for high-speed flight. The tail section is distinctive, with a split, twin vertical stabilizer configuration that enhances stability and control. The cockpit is integrated smoothly into the forward fuselage, with a subtle canopy outline visible. The overall construction suggests a high-performance, possibly military or sci-fi inspired aircraft.
description: A dark, angular airplane with swept-back wings, twin underwing jet engines, and red accent lines, featuring a split tail and a streamlined forward cockpit.
description_view_0: Side view showing the pointed nose, swept-back wings, underwing engines, and split tail configuration.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wide wingspan, anhedral wing angle, and the forward cockpit placement.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the engines and angular wing design.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the split twin vertical stabilizers and the full width of the wings.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with sharply swept wings and a slight anhedral angle, no visible winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines mounted under each wing.
attribute_tail_design: H-tail configuration with twin vertical stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable tricycle landing gear with two main units and one nose gear visible.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit integrated into the fuselage with a single canopy.
